resources.string: access phone number, IMEI, and IMSI
Advertising capabilities cannot be called in the background
Requesting to open other app sure to open?
Requesting to open %1$s sure to open?
The server does not understand the syntax of the request
The server could not find the requested web page
Disable the method specified in the request
The requested content page could not be used to respond to the requested web page
The request requires authorization to use the agent
A timeout occurred while the server was waiting for a request
The server has a conflict when it completes the request
The requested resource has been permanently deleted
The server does not accept requests without a valid content length header field
The server did not meet the prerequisites set in the request
"The server was unable to process the request because the request entity was too large and exceeded the server's processing power"
The requested URI is too long for the server to process
The format of the request is not supported by the request page
The page could not provide the scope of the request
"The server did not meet the requirements of the 'expected' request header field"
The server encountered an error and could not complete the request
The server does not have the ability to complete the request
The server acts as a gateway or proxy and receives an invalid response from the upstream server
The server acts as a gateway or proxy and does not receive requests from the upstream server in a timely manner
The server does not support the HTTP protocol version used in the request
The page you visited could not be opened(%d)
欢迎体验小游戏，小游戏的运行能力由小游戏服务提供，后续您也可以通过小游戏服务管理小游戏的账号，权限，存储占用等。在您使用本应用的过程中，我们将联网提供必要服务。
"You can close a quick app by tapping the \"×\" in the top right corner of the quick app's floating window."

"To delete a quick app, search \"Quick apps\" and select \"Manage apps\". Find the quick app you'd like to delete, select \"Permissions\" and deny the related permissions. Please note that once you deny permissions for the quick app, you won't be able to open or use it again."
To find a specific quick app, open GetApps and tap \"Software\". Tap the Quick apps icon to view all available quick apps.
"To find the history of quick apps you've used, go to GetApps > Quick apps > Profile > View all."
If you wish to stop using Quick apps, you can withdraw your consent to our Privacy Policy by searching \"Quick apps service framework\" in Settings, and then selecting \"Withdrawal of consent\".

"Quick apps contains both the Quick apps service framework as well as individual quick apps. Individual quick apps can be uninstalled (see FAQ #3 for more information). Quick apps service framework, however, is a basic system service and can't be uninstalled."
You can turn off automatic updates in GetApps > Profile > Settings.
Open a floating window when switched to background
Allow mini game to auto install shortcut
Except when menu bar is closed
未读消息顶部消息中心角标提醒
您可以在 系统设置 > 应用设置 > 小游戏服务 > 通知管理 进行授权。
开启通知权限，获得最新订阅消息。点击“去开启”前往对应设置页开启
开启通知权限获得最新消息
您可以到设置 > 隐私与安全 > 隐私 > 其他权限 > 特殊权限设置 > 显示在其他应用上层，来开启权限
您已关闭小游戏服务的“显示在其他应用上层”权限，请前往“设置”中开启相应权限
您可以在 系统设置 > 应用设置 > 应用管理 > 小游戏服务 > 权限管理 > 其他权限 > 桌面快捷方式 进行授权
“添加到桌面”需要您开启桌面快捷方式的权限，点击“去开启”前往对应设置页开启。
Display floating window icon at top of screen
"When you unsubscribe, the following settings won't be available"
顶部快捷功能图标管理
您需要安装新版本的游戏服务，才能使用%1$s功能，是否安装游戏服务？
"You've unsubscribed from %s. Subscribe again in Settings > Notification subscriptions."
Only showing orders from the last half year
前往应用商店——小游戏中心，找到小游戏入口
Your settings have been saved and will take effect after the next restart. Do you want to restart the Xiaomi Mini-game immediately?
Apply for public information such as your avatar, nickname, etc.
%1$s need to restart to use the latest features
导出 Log Manager 日志
由于《游戏服务》受到自启动权限限制，连接失败。如果您需要使用完整的功能与服务，建议您在系统设置中开启《游戏服务》的自启动权限
游戏服务正在升级中，请稍候重试
出现未知错误，请尝试重启游戏
登录失败：请同意游戏服务隐私授权并重试
登录失败：游戏包名尚未注册，请在开发者后台申请接入包名
登录失败：账号已注销，请更换账号重试
登录失败：网络未连接，请检查网络
登录失败：游戏服务版本过低，请更新游戏服务
根据你的实名注册信息判断你是未成年人，仅可在周五、六、日以及法定节假日晚20:00–21:00玩游戏
\"%1$s\" is trying to create a Home screen shortcut.
Fail to fetch lasted cloud config.
Lasted cloud config. has been fetched successfully
添加失败，当前的系统版本不支持小部件
当前桌面已存在，无法重复添加
订阅失败，请检查网络情况
"订阅成功 如需取消,可在设置>订阅消息中操作"
当前应用商店版本过低，请升级到最新版本后点击
正在登录中，请稍候再操作
An error occurred. Open Reports and feedback again.
当前页面出错，无法跳转
当前账号的游戏数据将永久删除，重新游玩需要再次登录。
是否删除所选小游戏的数据
删除选中的小游戏数据
"Reject bad games and protect yourself. Have your time but don't be addicted to games."
"Reject bad games and protect yourself.Have your time but don't be addicted to games."
"当前登录遇到了问题 您可以尝试通过重新进入游戏解决 是否立即退出当前游戏？"
Data is calculated from January 1, 2025 to yesterday
"Couldn't load the app. Tap \"Refresh\" to try again."
"Couldn't connect to the network. Tap to try again."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
很遗憾！浏览时长不足，未获得奖励
请点击关闭按钮进行关闭
Place the barcode inside the frame to scan it.
进入我的举报与反馈查看
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Fail to request from network, please try again later.
Not subscribed to any tiny games
Access photos and files stored on device
Access and save photos and files on device
Access and save items to call history
Access photos or files on device
向开发者提供蓝牙能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供 WLAN 能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供授权小米账号的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供获取通话记录的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供读取联系人的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供获取设备信息的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供读取信息能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供发送信息能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供使用日历事件的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供相机能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供获取位置的能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供录音能力，需经用户授权。
向开发者提供存储能力，需经用户授权。
安装新版本会中断当前在玩的游戏,是否现在安装?
"Network isn't responding. Check your network connection."
If you continue, records for this game will be deleted from this account. You can create new records by playing it again. Delete now?
Showing records from the last 6 months
Update GetApps to the latest version and try again
还没有权限使用记录哦
撤销同意小游戏服务的隐私政策后，您将无法继续游玩小游戏，请谨慎操作。
已尝试添加到桌面，如未成功请在设置中开启权限
您可以在 系统设置 > 应用设置 > 小游戏服务 > 权限管理 > 其他权限 > 桌面快捷方式 进行授权。
添加到桌面需要您开启 桌面快捷方式的权限，点击去开启前往对应设置页，选择其他权限>桌面快捷方式>小游戏服务进行开启。
开启桌面快捷方式权限
%s requests to send the following types of notifications:

string.name: system_permission_declare_double_link
string.Data: 请您阅读并同意我们的隐私政策

resources.string: Fifth day of Chinese New Year

Seventh day of Chinese New Year
Sixth day of Chinese New Year
Third day of Chinese New Year

试玩小游戏，即可获取奖励
Allow Quick apps to use this content as evidence in a complaint
Allow the developer to contact you via customer service
"You've already filled in some information. If you exit now, your changes won't be saved. Exit anyway?"
Enter your phone number or email address
Describe the issue you encountered in detail to help our engineers identify the issue. Enter at least %1$d characters.
Image exceeds %1$d MB. Try another or compress it.
Check your network settings and try again
"We'll process your feedback as soon as possible"
"If you try again and still can't submit successfully, check or switch your network settings and try again."
Image or video is still uploading. Try again once upload completes.
Video exceeds %1$d MB. Try another or compress it.
Connect Download Manager failed, please check the Download Manager state in the Application Management.
Storage unavailable, please check the SD card.
